Findings.Title: expression-injection: Untrusted input in run step
Findings.Detail: Expression '${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}' in run step is vulnerable to injection (file: .github/workflows/ci.yml)
Findings.Remediation: Use an environment variable instead of directly interpolating the expression in the run step.

Findings.Title: unpinned-uses: Action reference is not pinned to a SHA
Findings.Detail: Action 'actions/checkout@v4' is not pinned to a full SHA hash (file: .github/workflows/ci.yml)
Findings.Remediation: Pin the action to a full commit SHA instead of a mutable tag.

Findings.Title: dangerous-triggers: Workflow uses dangerous trigger
Findings.Detail: Workflow uses pull_request_target trigger which runs with write permissions in the context of the base branch (file: .github/workflows/auto-label.yml)
Findings.Remediation: Avoid pull_request_target unless strictly necessary. If needed, ensure no untrusted code is checked out or executed.
